queries.sql: select `locales`.*, `channel_locales`.`channel_id` as `pivot_channel_id`, `channel_locales`.`locale_id` as `pivot_locale_id` from `locales` inner join `channel_locales` on `locales`.`id` = `channel_locales`.`locale_id` where `channel_locales`.`channel_id` = 1

select `currencies`.*, `channel_currencies`.`channel_id` as `pivot_channel_id`, `channel_currencies`.`currency_id` as `pivot_currency_id` from `currencies` inner join `channel_currencies` on `currencies`.`id` = `channel_currencies`.`currency_id` where `channel_currencies`.`channel_id` = 1
select `product_id` from `wishlist_items` where `wishlist_items`.`customer_id` = 1 and `wishlist_items`.`customer_id` is not null and `channel_id` = 1

select `pf`.`product_id`, `pf`.`sku`, `pf`.`name`, `pf`.`url_key`, `pf`.`price`, `pf`.`special_price`, `pf`.`special_price_from`, `pf`.`special_price_to`, (SELECT pi.path FROM product_images pi WHERE pi.product_id = pf.product_id ORDER BY pi.position ASC, pi.id ASC LIMIT 1) as img_path, `ssp`.`id` as `ssp_id` from `product_flat` as `pf` inner join `seller_store_products` as `ssp` on `ssp`.`product_id` = `pf`.`product_id` where `pf`.`channel` = 'default' and `pf`.`locale` = 'en' and `pf`.`status` = 1 and `pf`.`visible_individually` = 1 and `pf`.`parent_id` is null and exists (select 1 from `product_images` as `pi` where `pi`.`product_id` = `pf`.`product_id`) and `ssp`.`seller_id` = 3 and `ssp`.`is_recommended` = 1 order by `ssp`.`updated_at` desc, `ssp`.`id` desc limit 10

select `pf`.`product_id`, `pf`.`sku`, `pf`.`name`, `pf`.`url_key`, `pf`.`price`, `pf`.`special_price`, `pf`.`special_price_from`, `pf`.`special_price_to`, (SELECT pi.path FROM product_images pi WHERE pi.product_id = pf.product_id ORDER BY pi.position ASC, pi.id ASC LIMIT 1) as img_path, `ssp`.`id` as `ssp_id` from `product_flat` as `pf` inner join `seller_store_products` as `ssp` on `ssp`.`product_id` = `pf`.`product_id` where `pf`.`channel` = 'default' and `pf`.`locale` = 'en' and `pf`.`status` = 1 and `pf`.`visible_individually` = 1 and `pf`.`parent_id` is null and exists (select 1 from `product_images` as `pi` where `pi`.`product_id` = `pf`.`product_id`) and `ssp`.`seller_id` = 3 order by `ssp`.`updated_at` desc, `ssp`.`id` desc limit 10

select count(*) as aggregate from `product_flat` as `pf` inner join `seller_store_products` as `ssp` on `ssp`.`product_id` = `pf`.`product_id` where `pf`.`channel` = 'default' and `pf`.`locale` = 'en' and `pf`.`status` = 1 and `pf`.`visible_individually` = 1 and `pf`.`parent_id` is null and exists (select 1 from `product_images` as `pi` where `pi`.`product_id` = `pf`.`product_id`) and `ssp`.`seller_id` = 3

select `pf`.`product_id`, `pf`.`sku`, `pf`.`name`, `pf`.`url_key`, `pf`.`price`, `pf`.`special_price`, `pf`.`special_price_from`, `pf`.`special_price_to`, (SELECT pi.path FROM product_images pi WHERE pi.product_id = pf.product_id ORDER BY pi.position ASC, pi.id ASC LIMIT 1) as img_path, `ssp`.`id` as `ssp_id` from `product_flat` as `pf` inner join `seller_store_products` as `ssp` on `ssp`.`product_id` = `pf`.`product_id` where `pf`.`channel` = 'default' and `pf`.`locale` = 'en' and `pf`.`status` = 1 and `pf`.`visible_individually` = 1 and `pf`.`parent_id` is null and exists (select 1 from `product_images` as `pi` where `pi`.`product_id` = `pf`.`product_id`) and `ssp`.`seller_id` = 3 order by `ssp`.`updated_at` desc, `ssp`.`id` desc limit 24 offset 0

statements.sql: select `locales`.*, `channel_locales`.`channel_id` as `pivot_channel_id`, `channel_locales`.`locale_id` as `pivot_locale_id` from `locales` inner join `channel_locales` on `locales`.`id` = `channel_locales`.`locale_id` where `channel_locales`.`channel_id` = 1

select `currencies`.*, `channel_currencies`.`channel_id` as `pivot_channel_id`, `channel_currencies`.`currency_id` as `pivot_currency_id` from `currencies` inner join `channel_currencies` on `currencies`.`id` = `channel_currencies`.`currency_id` where `channel_currencies`.`channel_id` = 1

select `pf`.`product_id`, `pf`.`sku`, `pf`.`name`, `pf`.`url_key`, `pf`.`price`, `pf`.`special_price`, `pf`.`special_price_from`, `pf`.`special_price_to`, (SELECT pi.path FROM product_images pi WHERE pi.product_id = pf.product_id ORDER BY pi.position ASC, pi.id ASC LIMIT 1) as img_path, `ssp`.`id` as `ssp_id` from `product_flat` as `pf` inner join `seller_store_products` as `ssp` on `ssp`.`product_id` = `pf`.`product_id` where `pf`.`channel` = 'default' and `pf`.`locale` = 'en' and `pf`.`status` = 1 and `pf`.`visible_individually` = 1 and `pf`.`parent_id` is null and exists (select 1 from `product_images` as `pi` where `pi`.`product_id` = `pf`.`product_id`) and `ssp`.`seller_id` = 3 and `ssp`.`is_recommended` = 1 order by `ssp`.`updated_at` desc, `ssp`.`id` desc limit 10
